name: Can't Fail Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour marshmallow creme into a large bowl.
2. In a saucepan, boil sugar, salt, and water until the mixture reaches the soft-ball stage.
3. Pour the boiling mixture over the marshmallow creme and stir until it becomes slightly stiff and peaks start to form.
4. Add vanilla and nuts to the mixture and mix well.
5. Pour the mixture into a buttered pan or drop spoonfuls onto wax paper.
